verdict.title: PERMIS.AI Verdict
verdict.subtitle: Development potential from Quebec public data — free and shareable.

legal.terms1Body: ZONNING and PERMIS.AI aggregate Quebec public data (permits, SEAO, RBQ, business registry). RBQ-Fit, pipeline scores, and PERMIS.AI verdicts are decision-support tools — not legal advice.
legal.terms2Body: Information comes from open government sources (Données Québec, municipalities). ZONNING does not guarantee completeness or absolute freshness; always verify with the official source before bidding or outreach.
legal.terms3Body: Compliance Vault documents lawful basis from verifiable public registries. You remain responsible for CASL compliance and sector rules (RBQ, AMP).
legal.terms4Body: Essentiel, Pro, and Équipe plans are billed monthly via Stripe. Concierge is a one-time purchase. Cancel anytime via the Stripe portal.
legal.privacy1Body: We collect email, company profile (RBQ, trades, regions), sync logs, and module usage. Public PERMIS.AI verdicts store the address and analysis inputs.
legal.privacy2Body: Your data powers feed personalization, alerts, and billing. We do not sell contact lists. Équipe API keys are SHA-256 hashed.
legal.privacy3Body: The application uses Vercel and the database and email providers configured by the operator. Data residency depends on the region selected with each provider.
legal.privacy4Body: Contact us to access, correct, or delete your account. CASL compliance records may be retained for audit purposes.

zoningExpert.title: Regulatory zoning analysis
zoningExpert.subtitle: Separates verified facts, planning signals, and the checks still required before a compliance decision.
zoningExpert.noComplianceBody: The applicable municipal bylaw, zone schedule, and project standards are not all established. The displayed signal is not an authorization.
zoningExpert.noEvidence: No usable zoning evidence is indexed for this address.

checks.discretionary_approvals: SPAIP, conditional use, specific proposal, or variance
checks.pending_amendments: Pending amendments, notices, and draft bylaws

parcel_identity.action: Confirm lot identity, roll number, and civic-address match in the official roll or municipal map.
parcel_identity.reason: A zoning opinion must attach to the correct parcel, not only a nearby address.

zone_by_law.action: Open the current municipal zoning bylaw and zone schedule for the parcel.
zone_by_law.reason: Planning layers and nearby points do not establish the enforceable zone.

permitted_use.action: Verify the table of permitted, conditional, and prohibited uses.
permitted_use.reason: The app cannot infer use compatibility from a zone label alone.

height_and_density.action: Verify height, floor, density, and unit standards against the proposed project.
height_and_density.reason: A project can match the use but still fail dimensional standards.

setbacks_and_coverage.action: Check setbacks, lot coverage, siting, and built-form standards.
setbacks_and_coverage.reason: These controls usually decide whether the concept fits on the lot.

parking_and_loading.action: Check parking, access, loading, and mobility requirements.
parking_and_loading.reason: Operational requirements can block or condition an otherwise compatible use.

overlays_and_constraints.action: Confirm heritage, environmental, flood, agricultural, and special-area overlays.
overlays_and_constraints.reason: Nearby risk signals do not prove the legal status of the parcel.

discretionary_approvals.action: Check SPAIP, conditional-use, specific-proposal, variance, and council approval requirements.
discretionary_approvals.reason: Some projects require discretionary approvals even when base zoning looks compatible.

pending_amendments.action: Review pending amendments, notices of motion, and recent council decisions.
pending_amendments.reason: A stale bylaw snapshot can miss rules already moving through adoption.

warnings.planning_not_regulation: The PUM is a planning document; it does not replace the applicable municipal zoning schedule.
warnings.nearest_centroid_not_parcel: The match uses the nearest source point, not a geometric intersection with the parcel.
warnings.borough_summary_not_parcel: A borough summary cannot determine parcel-specific standards.
warnings.uses_not_verified: The table of permitted, conditional, and prohibited uses has not been verified.
warnings.dimensions_not_verified: Height, setbacks, siting, density, and parking standards are not all verified.
warnings.overlays_not_exhaustive: Nearby heritage and environmental signals do not prove the parcel's legal status.
warnings.amendments_not_checked: Pending amendments and discretionary decisions have not been confirmed.
warnings.project_not_defined: The project's use and dimensions must be defined before testing compliance.
